title: Refresh Trades
description: 一键重置村民交易  One-click reset of villagers' transactions
body:
WARNING: THIS MOD ONLY DOES BASIC TESTING

# Origins of the Refrash Trades
I am a lazy dog college student, because usually play my world survival mode is very tired to refresh the villagers transaction, so I made this one-click reset trading mod. My TECHNICAL SKILLS ARE very limited SO the module is very rough and probably won't be updated. If you happen to be playing these versions and hate resetting the librarian, you can try this mod.

# Features of the mod
This mod adds a "Refresh Trades" button in the top right corner of the Villager trading screen. When you click on it, all trades will be updated! For example, all 4 trading columns will refresh during Apprentice. The villager's stage will not change when resetting the transaction, and the wandering merchant will not be able to refresh the transaction.
